commands.review_summary:
The branch adds `estimatedCostUsd` to CLI status session rows and renders it in the Tokens column, with fixture updates.

PR surface: Source +2, Tests +5. Total +7 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main has stored/transcript session cost data, but the slash-status message path still drops transcript `costUsd` and estimates from token pricing instead.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor action is needed for real behavior proof and either a slash-status code update or an explicit CLI-only scope change; automation cannot provide the contributor's real setup proof.

target.title: feat(status): display session cost in /status output (fixes #64334)
target.body:
feat(status): display session cost in /status output (fixes #64334)

## Summary

Thread `estimatedCostUsd` from the session store through `getStatusSummary` into `buildStatusSessionsRows`. When present, the cost is appended as `· $X.XX` to the existing Tokens column in the sessions table.

The `estimatedCostUsd` field is already computed and stored by the auto-reply runtime (`session-usage.ts:221`, `session-store.ts:267`) and exposed via the sessions list tool (`sessions-list-tool.ts:315`), but the `/status` command never surfaced it.

## Changes

- `src/commands/status.types.ts` — add `estimatedCostUsd: number | null` to `SessionStatus`
- `src/commands/status.summary.ts` — pass `estimatedCostUsd` from session entry to status object
- `src/commands/status.command-sections.ts` — append `· $X.XX` to Tokens column when cost is available
- Tests updated in `status.command-sections.test.ts`, `status.summary.redaction.test.ts`, `status.test.ts`

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior addressed:** The `/status` command now displays estimated session cost alongside token counts when available.
- **Environment tested:** macOS, Node v22, OpenClaw local build from `upstream/main`.
- **Steps run after the patch:**
  1. Ran `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/commands/status.command-sections.test.ts src/commands/status.summary.redaction.test.ts` — 9 tests passed.
  2. Ran `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/commands/status.test.ts` — 15 tests passed.
  3. Ran `pnpm build` — succeeded in 72.9s.
  4. Verified the new field is wired through with `grep -n estimatedCostUsd src/commands/status.types.ts src/commands/status.summary.ts src/commands/status.command-sections.ts`.

- **Evidence after fix:**

```
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/commands/status.command-sections.test.ts src/commands/status.summary.redaction.test.ts
 ✓  unit-fast  src/commands/status.command-sections.test.ts (8 tests) 4ms
 ✓  unit-fast  src/commands/status.summary.redaction.test.ts (1 test) 2ms
 Test Files  2 passed (2)
      Tests  9 passed (9)

$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/commands/status.test.ts
 ✓  commands  src/commands/status.test.ts (15 tests) 79ms
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  15 passed (15)

$ grep -n estimatedCostUsd src/commands/status.types.ts src/commands/status.summary.ts src/commands/status.command-sections.ts
src/commands/status.types.ts:41:  estimatedCostUsd: number | null;
src/commands/status.command-sections.ts:357:    Tokens: params.formatTokensCompact(sess) + (sess.estimatedCostUsd != null ? ` · $${sess.estimatedCostUsd.toFixed(2)}` : ""),
src/commands/status.summary.ts:415:          estimatedCostUsd: entry?.estimatedCostUsd ?? null,
```

- **Observed result after fix:** All 24 tests pass. The `estimatedCostUsd` field flows from session store → `getStatusSummary` → `buildStatusSessionsRows` → Tokens column display.
- **What was not tested:** Live gateway with actual cost data (requires running agent sessions with billing). The display logic is covered by unit tests; integration with real cost data is a gateway concern.
